mapper.select: SELECT seq as username, tc_id as userId, tc_pw as password, tc_name as name, tc_email as email, tc_level as userLevel , 1 as isAccountNonExpired, 1 as isAccountNonLocked, 1 as isCredentialsNonExpired, 1 as isEnabled FROM tb_cs_info_user WHERE tc_id = #{username} AND tc_useyn= 1
SELECT case when tc_level = 100 then "ADMIN" when tc_level = 0 then "USER" end AS authority_name FROM tb_cs_info_user WHERE tc_id=#{username} AND tc_useyn= 1
SELECT case when menu_level = 100 then "ROLE_ADMIN" when menu_level = 0 then "ROLE_USER" end AS authorityName , URL AS url FROM tb_cs_menu
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_cs_info_user ( tc_id, tc_pw, tc_name, tc_nick, tc_email, tc_phone ) VALUES ( #{tcId},#{tcPw},#{tcName},#{tcName},#{tcEmail},#{tcPhone} );
mapper.select:
select seq AS seq , tc_id as tcId , tc_pw as tcPw , tc_name AS tcName , tc_phone AS tcPhone , tc_level as tcLevel , tc_email as tcEmail , tc_regdate AS tcRegdate ,( SELECT count(tiu.seq) FROM tb_cs_info_user tiu
AND tiu.tc_useyn = 1
AND tiu.tc_useyn = 0
AND tc_level = 100
AND tc_level = 0
AND tiu.tc_id like CONCAT('%', #{tcId}, '%')
AND tiu.tc_name like CONCAT('%', #{tcName}, '%')
AND tiu.tc_phone like CONCAT('%', #{tcPhone}, '%')
) AS hiddenCount from tb_cs_info_user
AND tc_useyn = 1
AND tc_useyn = 0
AND tc_level = 100
AND tc_level = 0
AND tc_id like CONCAT('%', #{tcId}, '%')
AND tc_name like CONCAT('%', #{tcName}, '%')
AND tc_phone like CONCAT('%',#{tcPhone},'%')
order by tc_regdate DESC
limit #{offsetPageable.offset}, #{offsetPageable.pageSize}
select tc_id as tcId , tc_pw as tcPw , tc_name AS tcName , tc_phone AS tcPhone , tc_email AS tcEmail , tc_level as tcLevel , tc_useyn as tcUseyn from tb_cs_info_user where tc_id = #{userId}
select tc_id as tcId , tc_pw as tcPw , tc_name AS tcName , tc_phone AS tcPhone , tc_email AS tcEmail , tc_level as tcLevel from tb_cs_info_user where tc_id = #{userId};
